extensions.name: UAE Price Comparison API
extensions.description: Compares your iPhone valuation against live listings on 3 major UAE marketplaces: Dubizzle, Facebook Marketplace UAE, and noon Used. Returns price range (min, avg, max) and number of active listings for the same model, storage, and condition grade.

request_schema.condition: string — condition grade (mint, excellent, good, fair, poor)

use_cases: Validate your valuation before quoting a seller
Justify pricing to skeptical sellers or aggressive buyers
Identify if a model is over- or under-supplied in the market

extensions.name: UAE Shipping Cost Calculator
extensions.description: Calculates shipping costs for phone-sized packages between any two UAE emirates. Supports standard (2-3 business days) and express (next business day) delivery. Includes insurance options for high-value devices.

request_schema.from_emirate: string — sender emirate (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, Umm Al Quwain)
request_schema.device_value: number — declared value in AED (for insurance calculation)

response_schema.insurance_cost: number — optional insurance in AED (1.5% of declared value)

use_cases: Quote total cost when buyer and seller are in different emirates
Compare standard vs express to help buyer decide
Factor shipping into pricing for remote buyers
